divergences.read: SEMIS: KR-semis volume -4.3% vs TW-semis 41.4% — 45.7pp gap. Same commodity, opposite flow = LOCAL SUPPLY DISRUPTION in KR, not a global demand signal. Price strength here is supply-driven (inflationary), and producers in TW gain share.
divergences.trade: prefer TW-exposed producers over KR-exposed; the spread is the alpha

divergences.read: COPPER: CL-copper volume -29.7% vs PE-copper 11.2% — 40.9pp gap. Same commodity, opposite flow = LOCAL SUPPLY DISRUPTION in CL, not a global demand signal. Price strength here is supply-driven (inflationary), and producers in PE gain share.
